ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code of the course (e.g., EDU292) */,
  "course_title" TEXT /* Title of the course (e.g., The Art of Storytelling) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "delivery_method" TEXT /* Delivery method of the course (e.g., In Person, Online, Hybrid) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the course was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the category is associated with */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Education, English) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "general_education" (
  "gen_ed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each general education designation */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the designation is associated with */,
  "designation_code" TEXT /* Code of the general education designation (e.g., C, HU) */,
  "designation_name" TEXT /* Name of the general education designation (e.g., Cultural Diversity in the US, Humanities, Fine Arts & Design) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gen_ed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_general_education_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_schedules" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the class belongs to */,
  "class_code" TEXT /* Code of the class (e.g., 19715) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the class (e.g., Dobson Campus SC 16N) */,
  "delivery_method" TEXT /* Delivery method of the class (e.g., In Person Lecture) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the class */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the class */,
  "days" TEXT /* Days the class meets (e.g., MoWe) */,
  "times" TEXT /* Times the class meets (e.g., 1:30 PM - 2:45 PM) */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the class */,
  "enrollment_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in the class */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* Current number of students enrolled in the class */,
  "room_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the room the class is taught in */,
  "waitlist_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can be on the waitlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the class was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_schedules_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_schedules_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the instructor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the instructor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the student (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA of the student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the student record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the student record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolling in the class */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the student is enrolling in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the class */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., Enrolled, Waitlisted, Dropped) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade of the student in the class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the enrollment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the enrollment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES class_schedules ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the material is required for */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of the material (e.g., Textbook, OER, Article) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the material */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the material */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the material */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN of the material */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the material */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the material record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the material record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_materials_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES class_schedules ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the note is for */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note or announcement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the note was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the note was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_notes_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES class_schedules ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Student, Instructor, Admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the history entry is for */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., Created, Updated, Deleted) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action performed */,
  "action_by" TEXT /* User who performed the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the history entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the history entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_history_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES class_schedules ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being evaluated */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student performing the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was performed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the evaluation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the evaluation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_evaluations_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_evaluations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
